originalTitle: Americans are skipping lettuce and salads as investigation into cyclospora outbreak continues
summary: Shares of salad chains like Cava, Chipotle and Sweetgreen closed lower on Monday.
content: Shares of salad chains like Cava, Chipotle and Sweetgreen closed lower on Monday.
chineseTitle: 随着对环孢子虫爆发的调查继续进行，美国人不再吃生菜和沙拉
chineseSummary: Cava、Chipotle 和 Sweetgreen 等沙拉连锁店的股价周一收低。
chineseContent: Cava、Chipotle 和 Sweetgreen 等沙拉连锁店的股价周一收低。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
